# Smart Fax Line Manager (Uplizd) - Automate fax provisioning and routing for streamlined operations

## Summary
The Smart Fax Line Manager by Uplizd automates the provisioning, assignment, and management of digital fax lines within your business infrastructure. By leveraging the Dialpad API, this workflow eliminates manual administrative overhead, ensures consistent line configuration, and provides real-time visibility into fax usage, enabling operations teams to maintain high-velocity communication pipelines without manual intervention.

---
